name: Sericia — Post-Purchase Review Request (T+3d after paid)
notes: Runs daily; finds sericia_orders.status='paid' with paid_at between T-3d and T-4d and review_requested=false, sends a review-request email. Drives social proof UGC for landing pages and Google Merchant reviews.

nodes.name: Mark requested (idempotency)
nodes.notes: Requires columns `review_requested bool default false, review_requested_at timestamptz` on sericia_orders.
